shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'python3 --version && python3 -m pip --version && python3 -m pip show build wheel setuptools || true'

/bin/bash -lc "python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-test-venv && /tmp/vectorops-test-venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && /tmp/vectorops-test-venv/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /tmp/vectorops-test-venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from vectorops import dotproduct
assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])
print(dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]))
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, sys
from pathlib import Path
log = open('/tmp/vectorops-pypi.log', 'ab', buffering=0)
proc = subprocess.Popen(
    [sys.executable, '-m', 'http.server', '8080', '--directory', str(Path('/home/user/workspace/pypi').resolve())],
    stdout=log,
    stderr=log,
    start_new_session=True,
)
print(proc.pid)
PY"
/bin/bash -lc "sleep 1; ps -ef | grep '[h]ttp.server 8080' || true; curl -I http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ || true"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-test-venv2 && /tmp/vectorops-test-venv2/bin/pip install --upgrade pip >/dev/null && /tmp/vectorops-test-venv2/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /tmp/vectorops-test-venv2/bin/python - <<'PY'
from vectorops import dotproduct
print(dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]))
assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])
PY"
